name: istefox-dt-mcp
description: MCP server for DEVONthink 4 — outcome-oriented tools, RAG-augmented, privacy-first.
long_description: Connettore MCP best-in-class per DEVONthink 4. Sei tool MCP operativi end-to-end: list_databases, search (BM25 + vector + hybrid RRF), find_related, ask_database (vector + BM25 fallback), file_document e bulk_apply (entrambi preview-then-apply con audit log e undo selettivo). RAG locale opzionale via ChromaDB embedded. Tutti i dati restano sulla macchina: nessuna telemetry, embedding generati localmente, audit log SQLite append-only.
